summary: Tested P1 tasks: Pet Soul video link implementation and Celebrate page UI/UX. All 5 features tested and WORKING correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 tasks verified working: 1) Footer 'How Pet Soul Works' link opens SoulExplainerVideo modal on Celebrate page, 2) Pet Profile 'What is Pet Soul?' link opens SoulExplainerVideo modal, 3) Party Planning Wizard opens from 'Plan My Party' button on /celebrate, 4) Celebrate page is responsive on mobile (390x844), 5) CelebrateConcierePicker 'Plan Celebration' button requires login and opens PartyPlanningWizard after auth.

feature_1_footer_soul_explainer.details: Footer 'How Pet Soul™ Works' link dispatches 'openSoulExplainer' custom event. CelebratePage listens for this event (line 115-120) and opens SoulExplainerVideo modal (line 845-852). Verified working via Playwright test.

feature_2_pet_profile_soul_explainer.details: UnifiedPetPage has 'What is Pet Soul™?' link with data-testid='what-is-pet-soul-link' (line 1368-1375). Clicking it sets showSoulExplainer=true and opens SoulExplainerVideo modal (line 2303-2310). Tested with pet ID 'pet-99a708f1722a' (Mojo).

feature_3_party_planning_wizard.details: Clicking 'Plan My Party' button (data-testid='party-planning-wizard-btn') on /celebrate page opens PartyPlanningWizard modal showing 'Who's the star of the party?' step 1 content.

feature_4_celebrate_responsive.details: Celebrate page tested at mobile viewport (390x844). Shows proper responsive layout: stacked buttons (Plan My Party, Build Birthday Box, Shop Cakes), 2x2 category grid, proper spacing. Found 5 two-column grid layouts confirming mobile responsiveness.

feature_5_celebrate_conciere_picker.details: CelebrateConcierePicker on /celebrate/cakes has 'Plan Celebration' button (data-testid='plan-celebration-btn'). Without login: shows 'Sign in required' toast and redirects to /login. With login: opens PartyPlanningWizard modal (verified via code review - handlePlanCelebration sets showPartyWizard=true).

verification_evidence.footer_link_test: Screenshot shows SoulExplainerVideo modal with 'What is Pet Soul™?' title after clicking footer link
verification_evidence.pet_profile_test: Screenshot shows Mojo's pet profile with 'What is Pet Soul™?' link visible in Soul Score card, modal opens with confetti animation
verification_evidence.party_wizard_test: Screenshot shows Party Planning Wizard modal with step indicators (Pet, Occasion, Date, Details, Budget, Review) and 'Who's the star of the party?' content
verification_evidence.mobile_responsive_test: Screenshots show proper mobile layout at 390x844 viewport with stacked buttons and 2x2 category grid
verification_evidence.plan_celebration_test: Screenshot shows CelebrateConcierePicker with 'Plan Celebration' button, redirects to login when not authenticated

code_review_notes.CelebratePage.jsx: Lines 115-120: Event listener for 'openSoulExplainer'. Lines 845-852: SoulExplainerVideo modal rendering with Suspense fallback.
code_review_notes.UnifiedPetPage.jsx: Line 309: showSoulExplainer state. Lines 1368-1375: 'What is Pet Soul™?' link with data-testid. Lines 2303-2310: SoulExplainerVideo modal.
code_review_notes.Footer.jsx: Line 302: Dispatches 'openSoulExplainer' custom event on 'How Pet Soul™ Works' button click.
code_review_notes.CelebrateConcierePicker.jsx: Lines 92-106: handlePlanCelebration checks for login, shows toast if not authenticated, opens PartyPlanningWizard if authenticated.
